item.title: 甲骨文应对现金短缺的新举措：自带芯片
item.description: 该公司表示，数据中心客户将承担昂贵人工智能芯片的预付成本。【原文：The company says data center customers will pay the upfront cost of expensive AI chips】

item.title: 伊朗战争对中国再通胀努力构成双刃剑风险
item.description: 中国有能力应对能源成本上升，但出口若受冲击将拖累经济增长。【原文：China is well placed to cope with higher energy costs, but any blow to exports would dent growth】

item.title: 礼来将投资30亿美元于中国以推动减肥药研发
item.description: 礼来公司将在未来十年内向中国投资30亿美元，扩大本地生产规模，重点布局减肥领域。这家美国制药巨头正致力于巩固其在蓬勃发展的肥胖症市场中的主导地位。【原文：Eli Lilly & Co will invest $3 billion in China over the next decade to expand local production, with a focus on weight loss as the US drugmaker looks to cement its dominance in the booming obesity market.】

item.title: 壳牌宣布卡塔尔液化天然气合同不可抗力
item.description: 据知情人士透露，由于卡塔尔液化天然气持续停产，壳牌公司已对其部分亚洲客户的液化天然气合同宣布不可抗力。【原文：Shell Plc has declared force majeure on its liquefied natural gas contracts with some of its customers in Asia, according to people familiar with the matter, due to the ongoing Qatar LNG shutdown.】

item.title: 印度总理莫迪呼吁减少对进口能源的依赖
item.description: 印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪表示，随着中东战争给这个全球第三大石油消费国的政策制定者带来挑战，印度需要实现自给自足，减少对进口能源的依赖。【原文：India needs to become self-reliant and less dependent on imported energy, Prime Minister Narendra Modi said as the war in the Middle East poses a challenge for policymakers in the world’s third-largest oil consumer.】

item.title: 辛塔斯同意以55亿美元收购制服制造商优尼第一
item.description: 辛塔斯公司已同意以现金加股票的方式收购优尼第一公司，该交易对这家制服供应商的估值为55亿美元，从而结束了对竞争对手长达数年的收购追求。【原文：Cintas Corp. has agreed to buy UniFirst Corp. in a cash-and-stock deal valuing the uniform supplier at $5.5 billion, clinching a years-long pursuit of its rival.】

item.title: 日本将单方面释放战略石油储备，高市早苗表示
item.description: 日本首相高市早苗表示，该国将自行释放战略石油储备，以应对中东战争带来的影响。【原文：Japan will release oil from its strategic reserves on its own, according to Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi, as the nation grapples with the fallout of the war in the Middle East.】

item.title: 华尔街乐观认为软件行业最糟糕的崩盘已告一段落
item.description: 在因人工智能颠覆性影响引发的恐慌性抛售后，软件股似乎已触底——至少目前如此。【原文：After months of heavy selling on fears of artificial-intelligence disruption, software stocks appear to have found a bottom — at least for now.】

item.title: MFS首席执行官被控利用空壳公司欺诈巴克莱银行、Castlelake公司
item.description: 据称，一家与帕雷什·拉贾旗下现已倒闭的抵押贷款机构Market Financial Solutions关系密切的公司，被用于从巴克莱银行支持的实体以及布鲁克菲尔德资产管理公司控股的大多数企业中转移资金。【原文：A company closely aligned with Paresh Raja’s now-defunct mortgage lender Market Financial Solutions was allegedly used to siphon off funds from entities backed by Barclays Plc and a firm majority owned by Brookfield Asset Management Ltd.】

item.title: 库比切克称捷克利率水平合理，具备应对油价冲击的缓冲空间
item.description: 捷克央行理事扬·库比切克表示，即使燃料成本上升，通胀仍将保持在可控范围内，因此央行无需加息即可应对全球油价上涨。【原文：The Czech central bank can wait out a global surge in oil prices without raising interest rates because inflation will stay under control even with higher fuel costs, according to board member Jan Kubicek.】

item.title: 里夫斯称对伊朗战争对英国影响的猜测不妥
item.description: 财政大臣瑞秋·里夫斯表示，评估伊朗战争对英国造成的经济影响为时尚早，她似乎排除了立即向家庭和企业提供援助的可能性。【原文：Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves said it was too soon to assess the economic impacts on the UK caused by the Iran war, as she appeared to rule out immediate help for households and businesses.】

item.title: GoTo盈利预测因成本削减超出预期
item.description: GoTo集团预测今年盈利将超出分析师预期，为这家印尼网约车和外卖服务商在与Grab控股有限公司的竞争中注入新动力，尽管面临日益增大的收购压力。【原文：GoTo Group forecast earnings for this year above analysts’ estimates, giving the Indonesian ride-hailing and food delivery provider fresh momentum in its rivalry with Grab Holdings Ltd. even as pressures mount for a takeover.】

item.title: 资金因伊朗战争动荡加持欧洲天然气多头头寸
item.description: 随着中东战争使全球天然气供应前景蒙上阴影，基金及其他投机者将欧洲天然气净多头头寸推升至逾一年高位。【原文：Funds and other speculators boosted their net long positions in European gas to the highest level in more than a year as the war in the Middle East clouded the outlook for global flows.】

item.title: 泰国货轮在霍尔木兹海峡遇袭；三名船员失踪
item.description: 泰国皇家海军称，一艘悬挂泰国国旗的货轮周三在霍尔木兹海峡遭遇袭击，当时该船刚从阿拉伯联合酋长国启航不久。随着地区紧张局势持续扰乱这条全球最重要的航运通道之一，目前已有三人失踪。【原文：A Thai-flagged cargo vessel was struck in the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday shortly after departing from the United Arab Emirates, the Royal Thai Navy said, as regional tensions continue to disrupt one of the world’s most critical shipping lanes. Three people are missing.】

item.title: 希腊将对燃料和食品杂货利润率实施上限
item.description: 希腊将对燃料和食品杂货实施利润上限，以控制关键商品价格，防止因中东动荡引发的进一步涨价。【原文：Greece will impose a profit margin cap on fuel and groceries, in a bid to keep prices of key goods under control and prevent further surges stemming from the turmoil in the Middle East.】

item.title: 津巴布韦寻求合作伙伴推进2亿美元卫星项目
item.description: 津巴布韦财政部长姆图利·恩库贝表示，该国正寻求投资者参与卫星项目合作，以加强电信连接能力。【原文：Zimbabwe is seeking investors to partner with it in a satellite project that will bolster telecommunications connectivity, Finance Minister Mthuli Ncube said.】

item.title: Zara亿万富翁奥尔特加将获得创纪录的32亿欧元股息
item.description: 阿曼西奥·奥尔特加今年将从Zara母公司Inditex SA获得约32亿欧元（37亿美元）的股息，这是这位亿万富翁从六十多年前共同创立的零售巨头处获得的最大一笔分红。【原文：Amancio Ortega is set to collect about €3.2 billion ($3.7 billion) in dividends this year from Zara owner Inditex SA, the biggest such payout the billionaire has received from the retail giant he co-founded more than six decades ago.】

item.title: CVC资本合伙公司罗伯·卢卡斯称，该公司下一期收购基金规模或创纪录
item.description: 据该公司首席执行官罗伯·卢卡斯透露，CVC资本合伙公司下一只旗舰基金的规模可能超过其前身——该基金仍是迄今为止为收购业务募集的最大资本池。【原文：CVC Capital Partners Plc’s next flagship fund could be bigger than its predecessor — still the largest pool of capital ever raised for buyouts — according to the firm’s Chief Executive Officer Rob Lucas.】

item.title: 石油与美元（或许还有中国）是唯一有效的交易标的
item.description:
美国作为原油生产国的作用支撑美元走强，而中国受油价飙升影响的程度低于预期。

【原文：

US role as crude producer bolsters the greenback, while China is more insulated from oil surge than expected.

】

item.title: 日本游说团体引导银行应对蓬勃发展的杠杆收购业务
item.description: 知情人士透露，随着日本并购交易激增，该国主要银行业游说团体计划为提供杠杆贷款的贷款机构制定风险管理准则。【原文：Japan’s main banking lobby plans to establish risk management guidelines for lenders offering leveraged loans to finance mergers and acquisitions deals as transactions soar in the country, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 德国若不持久战可承受伊朗战争，研究所称
item.description: 据柏林德国经济研究所预测，若伊朗战争冲突不再进一步升级，德国经济预计只会遭受轻微冲击。【原文：Germany’s economy is expected to suffer only a minor setback from the war in Iran if the conflict doesn’t escalate further, according to the German Institute for Economic Research in Berlin.】

item.title: 德国联邦银行放弃旧总部大楼，将改建为学校——《商报》报道
item.description: 据《商报》报道，德国联邦银行将放弃其位于法兰克福的历史性总部，这座粗野主义建筑长达十年的命运悬念就此落幕。【原文：Germany’s Bundesbank will give up its historic headquarters in Frankfurt, ending a decade of uncertainty over the brutalist building, according to Handelsblatt.】

item.title: 葡萄牙邮政公司据称就Banco CTT的处置方案咨询顾问
item.description: 据知情人士透露，葡萄牙邮政公司CTT已邀请顾问公司竞标相关职位，该公司正就其银行业务的未来发展方向进行评估。【原文：CTT – Correios de Portugal SA has invited advisers to pitch for roles as it explores options for its banking business, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 为何科技界痴迷于机器人社交网络Moltbook
item.description: 就像Reddit，但专为机器人设计。【原文：It’s like Reddit, but for bots.】

item.title: 工会称，尽管电力价格下调，萨曼科尔公司仍计划裁员
item.description: 据全国矿工工会称，尽管南非政府和国家电力公司已同意降低其冶炼厂的电价，但萨曼科尔铬业公司仍在推进裁员计划。【原文：Samancor Chrome Ltd. is pressing ahead with plans to cut jobs even after South Africa’s government and state power utility agreed to lower electricity prices for its smelters, according to the National Union of Mineworkers.】

item.title: 马来西亚任命高级官员推进反贪污专员后续工作
item.description: 马来西亚内阁收到关于反贪污委员会主席阿赞·巴基持股情况的调查报告，并将此事转交政府首席秘书跟进处理。【原文：Malaysia’s cabinet received a report on the probe into anti-graft chief Azam Baki’s shareholdings and referred the matter to the chief secretary to the government to follow up.】

item.title: 橡树资本的罗森伯格表示信贷市场展现出韧性
item.description: 橡树资本管理公司流动性优质信贷业务主管大卫·罗森伯格指出，面对地缘政治紧张局势和市场波动，企业信贷市场展现出非凡韧性，优质债务正提供诱人投资机会。【原文：Corporate credit markets are showing remarkable resilience in the face of geopolitical tensions and market volatility, with high-quality debt offering attractive opportunities, according to David Rosenberg, head of liquid performing credit at Oaktree Capital Management LP.】

item.title: 中国数据中心企业Vnet考虑发行美元债券以筹集扩张资金
item.description: Vnet集团作为中国最大的数据中心运营商之一，正考虑包括发行美元债券在内的融资方案以扩大产能，因国内人工智能行业的竞争日趋激烈。【原文：Vnet Group Inc., one of China’s largest data center operators, is weighing funding options including a dollar bond sale to expand capacity as a race for dominance intensifies in the country’s AI industry.】

item.title: 国际能源署提议大规模释放紧急石油储备
item.description: 据知情人士透露，国际能源署正提议释放紧急石油储备，这将是该机构历史上规模最大的一次，相关决定可能于周三晚些时候作出。【原文：The International Energy Agency is proposing a release of emergency oil reserves that would be the largest in its history, with a decision possible later on Wednesday, according to a person familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 台湾保险业因改革面临数十亿价值缩水
item.description: 台湾最大的人寿保险公司正为账面价值可能遭受数十亿美元的侵蚀做准备，因该行业正转向更严格的会计框架。【原文：Taiwan’s largest life insurers are braced for a multi-billion dollar erosion in book value as the industry transitions to a more rigorous accounting framework.】
